scripts.test:circuits: cd circuits && env HOME=/tmp/codex/eip8182-tool-home NARGO_HOME=/tmp/codex/eip8182-tool-home/.nargo nargo test --workspace
scripts.test:unit: npm run check:domains && npm run check:eip712 && node scripts/run-contract-tests.mjs --match-contract 'ShieldedPoolTest|InstallSystemContractsScriptTest'
scripts.test:slow: npm run test:unit && node scripts/run-contract-tests.mjs --match-contract VerifierPrecompileIntegrationTest -vv && node scripts/run-contract-tests.mjs --match-path test/SmokeE2E.t.sol
scripts.test:all: npm run test:slow && npm run test:e2e:fullflow
